headlines.description: AC Milan needed two late goals to secure a 2-0 win at Cremonese in Serie A on Sunday and bounce back from its second loss of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pulisic's Milan score late double, 10 pts off Inter

headlines.description: Juventus avoided a nightmare finish to their week after they salvaged a 3-3 draw against Roma in Serie A.
headlines.shortLinkText: Juve avoid 3rd straight loss, draw 3-3 at Roma
